sentences.target: Es wird plötzlich dunkel im Wohnzimmer.

translations.de: Es wird plötzlich dunkel im Wohnzimmer.
translations.en: It suddenly gets dark in the living room.
translations.es: De repente se oscurece la sala.
translations.fr: Il fait soudain sombre dans le salon.
translations.vi: Phòng khách bỗng tối sầm lại.
translations.hi: बैठक कमरे में अचानक अँधेरा हो जाता है.
translations.pl: W salonie nagle robi się ciemno.
translations.ro: În sufragerie se face deodată întuneric.
translations.ja: リビングが急に暗くなる。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun functioning as impersonal/dummy subject in an impersonal construction.
Finite auxiliary (3rd sg pres) used as a copular/change-of-state verb with a predicative adjective.
Sentence/verb-modifying adverb indicating suddenness.
Predicative adjective complement to 'wird', describing resulting state.
Fused preposition+article (contraction of 'in dem'); introduces a locative PP (dative).
Noun as object of the preposition; place of the state change (locative, dative with 'im').

sentences.target: Mein Handy klingelt plötzlich in der Tasche.
sentences.reading: /maɪn ˈhɛndi ˈklɪŋl̩t ˈplœt͡slɪç ɪn deːɐ̯ ˈtaʃə/

translations.de: Mein Handy klingelt plötzlich in der Tasche.
translations.ipa: /maɪn ˈhɛndi ˈklɪŋl̩t ˈplœt͡slɪç ɪn deːɐ̯ ˈtaʃə/
translations.en: My phone suddenly rings in my bag.
translations.es: Mi teléfono suena de repente en el bolso.
translations.fr: Mon téléphone sonne soudain dans mon sac.
translations.it: Il mio telefono squilla all'improvviso nella borsa.
translations.zh-Hans: 我的手机在包里突然响了。
translations.yue: 我個袋入面個電話突然響。
translations.ru: Мой телефон внезапно зазвонил в сумке.
translations.pt: Meu celular toca de repente na bolsa.
translations.vi: Điện thoại của tôi bỗng reo trong túi.
translations.nl: Mijn telefoon gaat ineens over in mijn tas.
translations.uk: Мій телефон раптом задзвонив у сумці.
translations.hu: A telefonom hirtelen csörög a táskában.
translations.hi: मेरा फोन अचानक बैग में बजने लगा.
translations.pl: Mój telefon nagle zaczął dzwonić w torbie.
translations.el: Το κινητό μου χτυπά ξαφνικά μέσα στην τσάντα.
translations.nb: Telefonen min ringer plutselig i veska.
translations.id: Ponselku tiba-tiba berbunyi di dalam tas.
translations.sv: Min mobil ringer plötsligt i väskan.
translations.ro: Telefonul meu sună deodată în geantă.
translations.cs: Můj telefon najednou začal zvonit v tašce.
translations.da: Min telefon ringer pludselig i tasken.
translations.ja: バッグの中でスマホが急に鳴り出した。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner modifying the noun; agrees with head noun in gender/number/case.
Noun serving as the subject of the clause.
Finite main verb (3rd sg pres) describing the action.
Adverb modifying the verb, indicating suddenness.
Preposition introducing a locative PP; selects dative here.
Definite article (feminine dative singular) agreeing with 'Tasche'.
Noun as object of the preposition 'in' (locative PP).

sentences.target: Er hält plötzlich vor dem Haus an.
sentences.reading: /eːɐ̯ hɛlt ˈplœt͡slɪç foːɐ̯ deːm haʊs an/

translations.de: Er hält plötzlich vor dem Haus an.
translations.ipa: /eːɐ̯ hɛlt ˈplœt͡slɪç foːɐ̯ deːm haʊs an/
translations.en: He suddenly stops in front of the house.
translations.es: Se detiene de repente frente a la casa.
translations.fr: Il s’arrête soudain devant la maison.
translations.it: Si ferma all'improvviso davanti a casa.
translations.pt: Ele para de repente em frente à casa.
translations.vi: Anh ấy bất ngờ dừng lại trước nhà.
translations.nl: Hij stopt ineens voor het huis.
translations.hi: वह अचानक घर के सामने रुक जाता है.
translations.id: Dia tiba-tiba berhenti di depan rumah.
translations.ro: Se oprește deodată în fața casei.
translations.ja: 彼は家の前で急に止まる。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun serving as the subject (3rd person masculine singular).
Finite verb (3rd sg pres); base verb in the separable construction 'anhalten' (to stop).
Adverb modifying the predicate, indicating suddenness.
Preposition introducing a locative PP; selects dative.
Definite article (dative singular masculine/neuter) modifying 'Haus'.
Noun as object of the preposition 'vor' (locative PP).
Separable verbal particle completing the verb 'anhalten'; appears clause-final in V2 main clause.

translations.es: El bebé empieza a llorar fuerte de repente.
translations.fr: Le bébé se met soudain à pleurer fort.
translations.it: Il bambino si mette all'improvviso a piangere forte.
translations.zh-Hans: 婴儿突然大声哭了起来。
translations.pt: O bebê começa a chorar alto de repente.
translations.tr: Bebek birden yüksek sesle ağlamaya başlıyor.
translations.nl: De baby begint ineens hard te huilen.
translations.hu: A baba hirtelen hangosan sírni kezd.
translations.hi: बच्चा अचानक ज़ोर से रोने लगता है.
translations.el: Το μωρό ξαφνικά αρχίζει να κλαίει δυνατά.
translations.nb: Babyen begynner plutselig å gråte høyt.
translations.ro: Bebelușul începe deodată să plângă tare.
translations.da: Babyen begynder pludselig at græde højt.
translations.fi: Vauva alkaa yhtäkkiä itkeä kovalla äänellä.
translations.ja: 赤ちゃんが急に大きな声で泣き出した。

tokens.explanation: Definite article (neuter nominative singular) modifying 'Baby'.
Noun serving as the subject of the clause.
Finite main verb (3rd sg pres), expressing the action.
Adverb modifying the verb, indicating sudden onset of the action.
Manner adverb modifying 'weint'; indicates volume.

My phone suddenly rings in my bag.
He suddenly stops in front of the house.
